sc_sutta: 92 “There are, mendicants, these two things. What two? Lack of conscience and prudence. These are the two things.”
sutta: Monks there are these two wise ones what two he who showed us a burden that befalls him and he who takes not up one that does not befall him these are the two
commentary: so these two sutas the buddha is saying that the buddha is saying that what is our duty what is our burden we should take it up now what is not our burden we should not take it up so if a person carries a burden that is is not his burden he's a fool or what he should the burden that he should carry here like forever for example towards his family and all that if he does not carry that duty that burden then he is a fool again now we come to
